top_signals.title: Capital Clean Energy Carriers Corp. Announces the Delivery of the LNG Carrier ‘Agamemnon’
top_signals.summary: Capital Clean Energy Carriers Corp. (NASDAQ: CCEC), an international owner of ocean-going vessels (the “Company,” “CCEC,” “we” or “us”), today announced that it has successfully taken delivery of the LNG Carrier (“LNG/C”) ‘Agamemnon’. Following its delivery on June 17, 2026, the LNG/C Agamemnon (HD Hyundai Samho Co., Ltd., 174,000 cbm) has commenced its previously announced ...
